mapper.select:
SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title, b.cover_image, b.author_name, b.book_price FROM book b ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM book WHERE book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM book WHERE book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
